name: SXY Szechuan
tagline: Sichuan specialist inside Ala Moana Center — bold, spicy dishes and strong ratings make it an easy stop after shopping.
mustOrder: mapo tofu — silky tofu in fiery chili-bean sauce
spicy chicken with dried chilies — la zi ji
shredded pork with garlic sauce — a milder option
talkStory: A Sichuan-focused restaurant inside Ala Moana Center that punches above the typical mall food court. Featured in Honolulu Magazine as 'Spicy is the New Sexy.' The mapo tofu and dry-fried chicken with chilies are legit spicy — not toned down for a mall crowd. Convenient location makes it easy to combine with Ala Moana shopping. Not as deep a menu as Chengdu Taste, but more accessible and easier to park. Lunch and dinner daily.
